book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve british food
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 11:45 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
